# EcoOS Core — Enterprise Environmental Intelligence
> AI-powered waste prediction, triage, and analytics for institutional food service in Hong Kong.

## Core
- Landing: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/
- Sign In: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/login
- Create Account: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/signup
- Dashboard: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/dashboard

## Features
- AI Waste Triage: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/triage
- Analytics & Reporting: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/analytics
- Waste Stream Tracking: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/waste-streams
- Hong Kong Geo Map: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/geo-map
- Audit Schedules: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/schedules
- Data Import: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/import
- API & Webhooks: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/api-keys
- Settings: https://hack2-pi.vercel.app/settings
